connectors.label: Codex
connectors.acceptanceGate: PM accepts controlled dry-run plan; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass; orchestration:check + lint/build when code changes
connectors.approvalEvidence: Get-Command and preflight resolve codex on PATH only; this is discovery evidence, not execution readiness. Missing controlled dry-run design, non-interactive JSON/auth-quota/timeout evidence, and no-UI proof.

connectors.label: Trae
connectors.acceptanceGate: Resolve a non-secret Models configuration; pass one separately authorized read-only stream-json smoke; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass
connectors.approvalEvidence: trae-cli 0.120.40 resolves on PATH and exposes headless print plus JSON modes. The single authorized read-only smoke returned parseable JSON with exit code 0 but top-level error 'Models is required'; no UI, workspace change, or Trae process residue was observed. Authentication and a successful model response remain unverified.

connectors.label: Qoder
connectors.acceptanceGate: Rejected until an independent headless Agent CLI or API provides captured structured output, timeout, and failure semantics
connectors.approvalEvidence: Static inspection found only the Qoder desktop CLI wrapper and UI chat subcommand. The chat definition has no structured output, timeout, headless, or auth controls; the app and aicoding-agent manifests expose no runtime bin or independent Agent executable. No Qoder prompt was executed.
